title: SimpleNote
description: A plugin that allows you to write a short note that will be displayed in the boss bar
body:
# SimpleNote
SimpleNote is a plugin that allows players to write a short note that will be displayed on their screen in the boss bar and will not be reset when re-entering the game
## Usage
/sn set [text] - sets the note (resets the previous note)

/sn reset - removes the note
